title: astragalus fuhsii
intro: Astragalus fuhsii, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to China and used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains isoflavones, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus fuhsii include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. Astragalus fuhsii is commonly prepared as a dried root or extract, and is used in teas, capsules, and infusions to support overall health and well-being.
